name: Full Technical Due Diligence Review
description: End-to-end due diligence review of an AI/Odoo platform.

steps.name: Ingest Project Context
steps.description: Read README, architecture docs, and source tree overview.

steps.name: Analyze Source Code Stubs
steps.description: Detect hardcoded lookup tables, empty engines, and mock data.

steps.name: Review Architecture Layers
steps.description: Evaluate each layer for separation of concerns and component independence.

steps.name: AI Design Review
steps.description: Check for real models, embeddings, tool use, and probabilistic reasoning.

steps.name: Odoo Capability Review
steps.description: Assess real Odoo integration vs sample data and static templates.

steps.name: Security and Production Readiness
steps.description: Evaluate auth, secrets, audit, HA, rollback, and compliance.

steps.name: Generate Scorecard
steps.description: Aggregate findings into a scored report.

steps.name: Produce Verdict and Recommendations
steps.description: Write final verdict with evidence and prioritized next steps.
